description: Unified UI for Laravel — Component Registry

button.name: button
button.description: A versatile button component with multiple variants, sizes, loading states, and icon support.

badge.name: badge
badge.description: Inline status indicators and labels with semantic color variants, dot indicators, and removable support.

card.name: card
card.description: A flexible container with header, body, footer sub-components, multiple visual variants, and interactive states.

input.name: input
input.description: A full-featured text input with labels, help text, error states, leading/trailing icons, prefix/suffix, and textarea mode.

alert.name: alert
alert.description: Contextual feedback banners for success, warning, error, and informational messages. Supports dismissible mode with Alpine.js.
alert.example: <x-ui-alert variant="success" title="Saved!">Your changes have been saved.</x-ui-alert>

avatar.name: avatar
avatar.description: User avatar with image, initials fallback, online indicator, and multiple sizes.

spinner.name: spinner
spinner.description: Animated loading spinner with configurable size, color, and screen-reader text.

separator.name: separator
separator.description: A horizontal or vertical divider line with optional label text.

skeleton.name: skeleton
skeleton.description: Animated placeholder shapes for content loading states — supports rectangles, circles, and text lines.

toggle.name: toggle
toggle.description: A switch / toggle component for boolean settings. Accessible, keyboard navigable, with labels and descriptions.

textarea.name: textarea
textarea.description: A multi-line text area with auto-resize, character count, label, and error state support.

select.name: select
select.description: A styled native select dropdown with label, help text, error states, and option groups.

checkbox.name: checkbox
checkbox.description: Styled checkbox with label, description, indeterminate state, and error support.
checkbox.example: <x-ui-checkbox name="terms" label="I agree to the terms" />

radio.name: radio
radio.description: Styled radio button with label and description text.

label.name: label
label.description: A styled form label with required indicator support.

progress.name: progress
progress.description: A progress bar with percentage display, color variants, animated stripe, and indeterminate mode.

tooltip.name: tooltip
tooltip.description: A lightweight tooltip powered by Alpine.js with configurable placement and delay.

modal.name: modal
modal.description: An accessible modal dialog with Alpine.js, focus trapping, backdrop blur, and multiple sizes.

dropdown.name: dropdown
dropdown.description: An Alpine.js powered dropdown menu with items, dividers, keyboard navigation, and placement options.

tabs.name: tabs
tabs.description: Accessible tab component with Alpine.js, horizontal/vertical orientation, and variant styles.

accordion.name: accordion
accordion.description: An expandable/collapsible content panel set powered by Alpine.js. Supports single or multiple open items.

breadcrumb.name: breadcrumb
breadcrumb.description: Navigation breadcrumbs with customizable separator and automatic current-page aria attributes.

pagination.name: pagination
pagination.description: A styled pagination component that integrates with Laravel's built-in paginator.

table.name: table
table.description: A styled data table wrapper with header, body, row, and cell sub-components. Striped, hoverable, and compact variants.

empty-state.name: empty-state
empty-state.description: A centered placeholder for empty views with icon, title, description, and action button slots.
empty-state.example:
<x-ui-empty-state
    title="No results found"
    description="Try adjusting your search or filters."
>
    <x-slot:action>
        <x-ui-button>Clear Filters</x-ui-button>
    </x-slot:action>
</x-ui-empty-state>

heading.name: heading
heading.description: Semantic heading component with configurable level, size, tracking, and weight.

text.name: text
text.description: Styled body text component with size, weight, color, and leading variants.

stack.name: stack
stack.description: A flex layout primitive for vertical or horizontal stacking with configurable gap, alignment, and wrapping.

container.name: container
container.description: A responsive max-width container with auto horizontal margins and configurable size breakpoints.

sheet.name: sheet
sheet.description: A slide-out panel (drawer) from any edge of the viewport. Powered by Alpine.js with focus trapping and backdrop.

popover.name: popover
popover.description: A floating content panel that appears on click with configurable placement. Powered by Alpine.js.

banner.name: banner
banner.description: A full-width announcement banner with optional dismiss, typically placed at the top of the page.
banner.example: New version available! See what's new.

aspect-ratio.name: aspect-ratio
aspect-ratio.description: A container that maintains a fixed aspect ratio for images, videos, and embedded content.

kbd.name: kbd
kbd.description: Keyboard shortcut indicator that renders styled key combinations.

code.name: code
code.description: Inline code and code block styling with optional copy-to-clipboard button.

stat.name: stat
stat.description: A statistic display card with value, label, trend indicator, and optional icon.

form.name: form
form.description: A styled form wrapper with CSRF token injection, method spoofing, and structured layout.
form.example:
<x-ui-form action="/login" method="POST">
    <x-ui-input name="email" label="Email" />
    <x-ui-button type="submit">Log In</x-ui-button>
</x-ui-form>

form-group.name: form-group
form-group.description: A form field group wrapper that handles label, help text, and error message layout.
form-group.example:
<x-ui-form-group label="Username" name="username" help="Choose a unique name.">
    <x-ui-input name="username" />
</x-ui-form-group>

slider.name: slider
slider.description: A styled range slider input with min/max, step, value display, and accessible labeling.

scroll-area.name: scroll-area
scroll-area.description: A custom styled scrollable container with thin scrollbar and fade indicators.

switch.name: switch
switch.description: An accessible toggle switch built with Alpine.js for boolean on/off controls.

collapsible.name: collapsible
collapsible.description: A simple Alpine.js show/hide toggle with smooth height animation.
collapsible.example:
Show more

Hidden content revealed on click.

alert-dialog.name: alert-dialog
alert-dialog.description: A confirmation dialog that requires user action before proceeding. Built with Alpine.js, focus-trapped.
alert-dialog.example:
<x-ui-alert-dialog
    name="delete-confirm"
    title="Are you absolutely sure?"
    description="This action cannot be undone."
    confirm-text="Delete"
    confirm-variant="destructive"
/>

command.name: command
command.description: A command palette / search dialog with keyboard shortcut activation, search input, and grouped results.

alpine-counter.name: alpine-counter
alpine-counter.description: An interactive Alpine.js counter component demonstrating integration with the Unified UI design token system.

calendar.name: calendar
calendar.description: Month-view date picker calendar with navigation, min/max constraints, and form input support.

carousel.name: carousel
carousel.description: Slideshow carousel with auto-play, navigation arrows, dot indicators, and loop support.

chart.name: chart
chart.description: Chart.js wrapper for bar, line, pie, and other chart types with token-driven theming.

color-picker.name: color-picker
color-picker.description: Inline color picker with native color input, hex text field, and optional preset swatches.

combobox.name: combobox
combobox.description: Searchable select dropdown with single and multi-select modes, clearable support, and form input binding.

confirm-dialog.name: confirm-dialog
confirm-dialog.description: Accessible confirmation dialog with title, description, confirm/cancel actions, and danger variant.

context-menu.name: context-menu
context-menu.description: Right-click context menu that positions itself within the viewport and integrates with dropdown items.

copy-button.name: copy-button
copy-button.description: Icon button that copies text to the clipboard with a success state, tooltip, and configurable duration.
copy-button.example: <x-copy-button text="npm install unified-ui" tooltip="Copy install command" />

data-list.name: data-list
data-list.description: Definition list (dl/dt/dd) for key-value pairs with horizontal and vertical orientations and optional dividers.

data-table.name: data-table
data-table.description: Full-featured data table with client-side sort, search, pagination, row selection, and loading state.

data-table-toolbar.name: data-table-toolbar
data-table-toolbar.description: Search and action toolbar designed to sit above a DataTable component.

date-picker.name: date-picker
date-picker.description: Date picker input that opens a Calendar popover with min/max constraints and form value binding.

drawer.name: drawer
drawer.description: Bottom, top, left, or right slide-in drawer panel with handle, close button, overlay, and focus trap.

file-upload.name: file-upload
file-upload.description: Drag-and-drop file upload zone with file type filtering, size validation, multiple file support, and preview list.

form-field.name: form-field
form-field.description: Form field wrapper providing a label, description, hint, and error message slot around any input.

hover-card.name: hover-card
hover-card.description: Rich popover card that appears on hover with configurable side, alignment, and open/close delays.

image-gallery.name: image-gallery
image-gallery.description: Responsive image grid with optional lightbox, configurable columns, and gap.

infinite-scroll.name: infinite-scroll
infinite-scroll.description: Sentinel-based infinite scroll that dispatches a load-more event when the user reaches the bottom.

input-group.name: input-group
input-group.description: Input with left/right add-ons, prefix text, suffix text, and error state for compound form fields.

markdown.name: markdown
markdown.description: Renders pre-processed HTML from Markdown with optional Tailwind prose typography styles.

menubar.name: menubar
menubar.description: Horizontal menu bar with dropdown menus, keyboard navigation, separators, and labels.

navigation-menu.name: navigation-menu
navigation-menu.description: Top-level horizontal navigation with mega-menu dropdowns and keyboard accessibility.

number-input.name: number-input
number-input.description: Numeric input with increment/decrement buttons, min/max/step constraints, and form binding.

pin-input.name: pin-input
pin-input.description: OTP / PIN input with configurable length, numeric or alphanumeric type, mask mode, and success/error states.

resizable.name: resizable
resizable.description: Split-pane layout with a draggable divider supporting horizontal and vertical directions with min/max size.

search-input.name: search-input
search-input.description: Search input with a leading icon, clear button, keyboard shortcut hint, debounced event dispatch, and loading state.

sidebar.name: sidebar
sidebar.description: Collapsible application sidebar with icon-only collapsed mode, configurable width, and left/right placement.

sonner.name: sonner
sonner.description: Sonner-compatible stacked toast notification stack with position, duration, and rich color variants.

steps.name: steps
steps.description: Step indicator / stepper with horizontal and vertical orientations, current step tracking, and clickable steps.

theme-toggle.name: theme-toggle
theme-toggle.description: Light/dark/system theme toggle button that persists preference to localStorage and syncs across tabs.

timeline.name: timeline
timeline.description: Vertical or horizontal timeline for displaying ordered events with dot indicators and animated connectors.

toast.name: toast
toast.description: Toast notification container that listens for a global toast event and shows stacked notifications with auto-dismiss.

toggle-group.name: toggle-group
toggle-group.description: Group of toggle buttons with single or multiple selection modes, horizontal or vertical orientation.

tree-view.name: tree-view
tree-view.description: Hierarchical tree with expand/collapse, selectable nodes, expand-all mode, and recursive rendering.

video-player.name: video-player
video-player.description: Video player wrapper with aspect ratio, autoplay, muted, loop, poster image, and native controls.

virtual-list.name: virtual-list
virtual-list.description: Virtualized list that renders only visible rows for high-performance display of large datasets.

visually-hidden.name: visually-hidden
visually-hidden.description: Renders content that is visually hidden but accessible to screen readers.
